title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Godrej Properties - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Godrej Properties - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Properties are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Properties:
Godrej Properties is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Properties!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
